title: Dominoes Set for Adults, Dominoes Set Double Six, Double 6 Jumbo Domino Tiles with Spinner in Exclusive Wooden Box,28 pcs Large Size Domino Set 28 Tiles with Brown Wooden Case
features: 【UNIQUE METAL SPINNER DESIGN】The sturdy plastic build of each ivory domino tile contains a metal spinner rivet in its center, adding a stylish fashion look and making them easier for players to turn and spin.

【KEEP BALANCE & STANDARD SYSTEM】Classical dominoes set has ideal weight and balance to lasting long fun. Domino block is numbered on a standard system, marked blank or with 1-6 recessed dots on both ends as is typical double-6 table game.
【DOMINOES PACKAGE & SIZE】Package: Portable wooden box. Dominoes' blocks size: ABOUT 1.9"L × 1.2"W × 0.3"H; 28pcs wooden box — 7.6"L × 2.8"W × 2"H, great for 2-4 players.

【MORE FUNNY GAMES】Double 6 dominoes set providing fun of hours for families, friends and kids. It can freely arranged different shapes and piled up. Whatever play Chicken Foot or Mexican Train games, that is really best choice!
【QUALITY AND SERVICE GUARANTEE】DOUBLEFAN SHOP will provide best quality, price and service for customers.If any questions, welcome to contact with us anytime.
